events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy-winning singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday today.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: Time to celebrate the one and only Cyndi Lauper turning 73! What's your favourite track from the 'Queen of Quirky Pop'?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the iconic British singer-songwriter George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: The legendary George Michael would have been 63 today. From Wham! to his incredible solo career, his music continues to inspire. What's your go-to George track?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the world lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His music and impact are still felt across the globe. What's your favourite MJ memory?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace and Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From The Beatles to his All-Starr Band, sending him peace and love today.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Rock God Turns 79
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today?! Still rocking stages around the world. What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV celebrates 45 years
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched 45 years ago today, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video ever aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! Remember the first video ever played? It was The Buggles with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years on
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994, featuring hits like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely A Classic
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped their game-changing debut album 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began 57 years ago today, a pivotal moment in music history.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the Woodstock Festival kicked off! A legendary three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years ago today, the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, left us. His music lives on forever. What's your favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the tragic passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix in 1970.

angles.name: Voodoo Child Forever
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago today, we lost a true guitar icon, Jimi Hendrix. His influence is still felt by musicians worldwide. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' 57 years on
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in 1969, featuring the legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Across The Universe
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic album cover and timeless tracks. What's your favourite from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' legendary frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her powerful voice and songwriting with The Pretenders continue to rock.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad For It!
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Oasis or solo track from the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' 55 years on
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' in 1971, a powerful call for peace and unity.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago today, John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its message of peace and hope.

events.title: Apple's first iPod 25 years on
events.blurb: Apple introduced the very first iPod in 2001, revolutionising portable music players.

angles.name: Thousand Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 25 years since Apple launched the original iPod? It put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed how we listen to music forever!

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Time to celebrate 007 with your favourite Bond theme tune. Shaken, not stirred, of course.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Legendary Lennon
angles.copy: The legendary John Lennon would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon song?
